title: Concept brief: item-first lifecycle trace
hypothesis: If ProductOS makes one item traceable from intake through PRD handoff with explicit artifacts and gate outcomes, PMs will understand discovery state faster and defend decisions with less manual reconstruction.
positioning_hypothesis: ProductOS will win as the lifecycle explanation layer for PM work, not as the broadest all-in-one PM platform.
offering_hypothesis: The offering should be an item-first decision layer that sits above discovery and delivery artifacts already in use.
wedge_hypothesis: A coherent item timeline and stage snapshot are the most credible entry wedge for a challenger posture in PM lifecycle visibility.
why_now: AI-assisted PM tooling is expanding quickly, which increases the need for trustworthy basic execution and clear stage lineage before adding more superpowers.
why_us: ProductOS already has structured artifacts, validation controls, and a reference workspace that can prove the pattern end to end.
advantage_hypothesis: An item-first timeline plus stage snapshot can combine the coherence of modern product systems with stricter evidence and governance discipline.

prioritization.priority_rationale: The concept is the bounded wedge that turns the lifecycle-visibility problem into one coherent execution shape and should be reviewed before delivery expansion.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: PM should confirm the item-first wedge stays inside the current claim boundary before the lifecycle slice expands beyond PRD handoff.

must_be_true_assumptions: PMs will trust one lifecycle surface if it links evidence and validation clearly
The timeline can coexist with existing execution systems rather than replacing them
open_questions: Which delivery-stage artifacts should become mandatory in the next slice after PRD handoff?
risk_summary: The concept fails if ProductOS promises broad platform breadth before the item-first wedge is proven.
The downstream delivery packet becomes noisy if the concept drops the explicit traceability and governance posture.
handoff_readiness_summary: The concept is reviewable and points at one explicit item-first wedge, but it still expects PM confirmation before the delivery spine broadens.
